hypothesis: A completed intraday close materially displaced from the causal session VWAP mean-reverts toward the frozen signal-time VWAP, adding non-breakout return density.

execution_contract.signal: First completed active-window bar closing beyond the fixed ATR deviation from causal cumulative session VWAP.
execution_contract.entry: Next M15 bar open; skip if that open has already crossed the frozen VWAP target.
execution_contract.target: Signal-time cumulative session VWAP, frozen before entry.

selection_contract.preholdout_gate: DEV trades>=150 PF>=1.15 net>0; validation trades>=25 PF>=1.05 net>0; at least four positive development years
selection_contract.selection: One global family winner by the lower of development and validation PF.
selection_contract.holdout_gate: trades>=50 PF>=1.10 net>0 and both 2024 and 2025 positive

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
